case_title: SANTOS JUAREZ IXCOY VS. DELTA GENERAL ENGINEERING PC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-28-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-28-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II.
